employment_rate_canada.html: Displays Statistics Canada's seasonally adjusted employment rate data for Canadian provincial governments.
nhpi_big6_comparison.html: Comparison of the New Housing Price Index (NHPI) across six major Canadian cities using Statistics Canada data.
